description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work

title: WolfLawS Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Silm Computer Mouse USB Optical Silent Mice with Nano Receiver, Portable Computer Mice for PC Mac Laptop Notebook Chromebook

By connecting the USB receiver with the USB port, you could use it at anytime and anywhere, no delays and interference. And please note that 2.4G connection distance cannot be over 33ft. NOTE: The mouse cursor would move slowly, unstable or stop moving at low battery, please replace the battery in time, while being full battery capacity, it would work normally again.

Ergonomic Design & Durable Quality -- Taking silm and lightweight design offers you better touch and using experience. Ergonomic design makes sure you would not feel uncomfortable even a long-session using, while USB Nano receiver is embedded in the back of the mouse, better and more convenient to put in. 3 million times keystroke tested, gives you reliable durability.

Portable and Easy to Take -- Portable size: 4.3in*2.6in*1.1in, which is easy and convenient for you to take the mouse anywhere, use it at anytime you need even outdoors, well for learing, office use and library use,etc.

reviews.title: Wonderful mouse for the price!
reviews.text: I love this mouse! It fits perfectly in my hand, and the usb Bluetooth works great with no issues. The clicks are silent, but the scroller click is not silent. This is fine for me since I don’t use my scroller to click very often, but if that bothers you, I thought it was important to point out.

reviews.title: Lightweight and Responsive
reviews.text: This little mouse is nice and responsive. I really enjoy using it. It's comfortable, too. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
It’s super super lightweight and feels very cheap. It comes with no instructions what so ever. It comes with a little usb input and so I plug it into my Chromebook and put in one AA battery. I flip the switch to on and it starts glowing red. I don’t know what the red light means, again, no instructions. Are the batteries dead? Is it not connected? No idea.
I open up the Bluetooth menu and it’s scanning and nothing is coming up and then I realize the cursor is moving with the mouse. I start rolling it around and it has horrible traction. It’s not a smooth motion as you’d expect from a mouse. Again, maybe my batteries were low, maybe the connection was low, I can’t say, although I switched out the batteries about 3 times and I doubt all 3 batteries were close to dead. I bought this for my sons online homework that he has to do, it consist of a lot of dragging items to designated locations on the screen and he’s been having difficulty using the mouse pad on the Chromebook . But it’s so flimsy, my daughter picked it up and lost it amongst the mess of toys and I don’t even feel at a loss.

reviews.title: Sleek and Elegant
reviews.text: This Mouse is a perfect match for our white Cherry keyboard. It has all the basic functions you need without the fancy programable buttons that some gaming people use. We find it exacting in use when we do retouching in Photoshop and movements are precise, with the nano receiver, and fast all the time. This is a good basic mouse to use every day on any computer. It's attractive and fits your hand comfortably.

reviews.title: Worked straight out the box
reviews.text: Small and comfortable. Easy to set up and use. Great value.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

title: Wireless Mouse, 2.4Ghz Wireless Mouse Computer Mouse 1200DPI,6 Buttons with Nano Receiver for Laptop,PC,Chromebook,Computer,Notebook,Office (Grey)
description: How to connect: Step1:open the battery cover,then install the two AAA battery . Step2:Take out the USB dongle and close the battery cover . Step3:Plug the USB dongle in the USB port . Step4:Place your wireless mouse close to the dongle about 30CM,turn the power switch button to "ON", the led light will light up.Your mouse will connect with the dongle automatically and start working . Notice if the mouse doesn't work ,please place the mouse near to the dongle and press the connect button (underneath the mouse)and release ,it wll connect to work . Package details Wireless mouse x1 USB nano receiver x1
features: System support: Windows,Android/Linux office/Mac OS device.
Wireless Mouse :RF2.4G wireless transmission distance of up to 10m.
Easy operation: USB nano dongle and power switch ,more convenient when plug in USB ,Plug and Play make all the operation more easier than others.
with 800/1200 CPI switch ,press left+mid+right button for switching ,2.4Ghz wireless ,1200cpi optical technology.
Package Contents: 1x Wireless Mouse, 1x Nano Receiver,Powered by two AAA battery (not included)

reviews.title: Good Basic Mouse
reviews.text: It serves the purpose intended. A good, basic wired replacement mouse.

reviews.title: Mouse in the house.
reviews.text: Works properly as it should, couldn’t beat the price.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: Great color selection. Fits my hand well.

reviews.title: I'll never go back to a flat mouse
reviews.text: I was suffering from tennis elbow for months, badly, and nothing I did was making any difference.  I have a job typing about 10 hours a day, eight days a week:/ and did some research about posture and what could cause this.  Already had an ergo keyboard, so I bought this ergo mouse.  WOW.  Unbelievable how almost immediately the tennis elbow cleared up.  This was super easy to get use to.  I have small hands, and the size is perfect.  I will never use a flat mouse again.  So very glad I stumbled upon this.  Best money I've ever spent.  Oh, and I absolutely love the fact that I do not have to replace batteries every week!

reviews.title: Well designed mouse, nothing like it
reviews.text: I love picking out a color I will enjoy looking at, other than basic black or white mice. I wanted the blue one forever, and years ago I got one in pink instead of blue per their mistake. I just kept it. I used it and yes it still works, I really wanted the blue one so I took my time to look for another one just like it and yes it is hard to find this blue color. Beautiful. The fit is very smooth and soft and perfect, they know what hands like to rest in a cupped shape and this is comfortable to work with. The glide is excellent and can be used for everyday, office, or gaming. Take a look around at other styles but you will not find one that fits like this ergonomically for the price which you cannot beat. The best part is that it is rechargeable and yes it comes with the cord and also you can use it while it is charging. Keep your wrist happy and get one.

reviews.title: Great ergonomic feel!
reviews.text: This is a great wireless mouse! It has been wonders to my carpel tunnel on my hand and love the natural feel of this. All computer mouses should be made like this, it just makes sense when you first use it. Anyways, seems pretty sturdy and have had no complaints since receiving it. Smooth trailing, battery seems to last long and love that it goes to sleep mode when not in use. Also, love the color; it's exactly as pictured!

reviews.title: Nice. But too small...
reviews.text:
I normally use medium sized gloves. sometimes small.

This mouse was designed for smaller hands than mine.

It's a nice mouse. small, cheap, comfortable, works well. the scroll wheel was really fun to use. but it didn't work for my case.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

reviews.title: Great for carpal tunnel!
reviews.text: I bought this mouse for its ergonomically design. It is great for my carpal tunnel. Sleep mode is fantastic and it’s easy to charge, which it does quickly.

title: skook Rechargeable Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro MacBook Air Notebook,Bluetooth Wireless Mouse for Laptop Bluetooth Mouse for PC,Notebook, PC,Laptop (Black)

features: Adopt bluetooth 4.0 technology,built-in durable 450mAh Lithium polymer rechargeable battery,high cycle life, The charging time is about 1.5 hours, lasting use time, the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for 15 minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up. energy saving and extremely low power consumption.

reviews.title: Super product. Great price.
reviews.text: Really responsive and not overly sensitive. Has been a great addition for tablet. Seamless connection didn’t loose once. Easy to navigate instructions for set up. Great battery life. Used for 7 hours consecutive without sign of needing charged.

reviews.title: Move along. Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Two months! Two months this mouse lasted, and that was with very light use. Fully charged, I was just scrolling with it when I felt the wheel break. It just stopped making the little clicky sound/feeling. No trauma, no misuse, just very very very cheaply made. I surrender. It's time to cough up the money and buy the Apple brand mouse for my MacBook. My sanity is at least worth the $60.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
After three previous tries, I finally got a Bluetooth mouse for my MacBook. I'm hoping this one is sturdier than the last I purchased that barely lasted six months. That remains to be seen, but given the product materials, I'm not hopeful. Making the connection after power-up or sleep mode is a little finicky. Also, a solid flat dark surface/mouse pad seems to be a prerequisite. Without it, the cursor is slow to respond or just does its own thing. I've never seen a mouse with the jitters before, but this one will cause the cursor to jiggle and twitch, even though the mouse itself it perfectly still, untouched. I've watched the cursor jitter clear off the screen. However, using a solid black mouse pad seems to have dealt with the problem. I would send it back and try a different product, but I've sent so many cheaply made and/or mislabeled mice back to Amazon in the past month, I've got return fatigue. We'll give this one a chance with the mousepad solution.

reviews.title: Won't hold a charge - must keep plugged in
reviews.text:
I've been through two of these. I returned/exchanged this first hoping it was just a defect. This mouse will only function appropriately for about 4-5 minutes tops if not directly plugged in to USB , otherwise it starts jumping/skipping/lagging etc. Plugged in it's perfect though - so if you get lucky and get one that holds a charge you'll probably be very happy with it. I just decided to keep this one and keep it plugged in. It's not ideal but it gets the job done.
I should probably mention that it is very easy to set up, basically plug and play - which was nice.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Great size and portability.  Saves a slot for other use.

reviews.title: Worth it!
reviews.text: This purchase is worth it. The mouse is slim and connects perfectly with the laptop. Careful you don't lose the mouse in your papers!
